title: Charms 'n Relics
description: A mod that adds relics and artifacts to minecraft
body: # Do you like ancient relics and artifacts? Well FEAR NOT! This mod adds ancient artifacts to minecraft! There is one way to get artifacts... And that's obviously crafting! _I might add the artifacts to sus sand._ There are two new items besides artifacts. And those are **Ruby** and **Raw Ruby**. You can find **Raw Ruby** in the nether. You can smelt it, and get a **Ruby**. And that's all I'll tell you! If you want to find out more, you can download this mod and check it our for yourself! _REI (Roughly Enough Items) is recommended, but not required._ # FAQ: - **Why should I get artifacts?** Well, they each have a special power. For example, with the Ruby amulet, you get 10% more health - **Are they just cosmetics?** No. They won't appear on your skin.
